title: Observable CoAP /sensors and /location resources
description: Extend lichen/coap/resources.py with observable resources (RFC 7641). Needs: ObservableSenMLResource base class using aiocoap resource.ObservableResource; /sensors resource that returns a SenML pack of all available readings; /location resource that returns lat/lon/alt SenML pack; update_state() method so callers can push new readings to observers; wire into build_site(). Tests cover observe subscription receiving pushed updates via InMemoryNetwork.
close_reason: SenML codec, profiles, and observable resources implemented; all tests passing
